---
title: "Assignments"
---

## Assignments

Course assignments, problem sets, labs, and related materials will be posted here as they become available.

| Assignment | Description | Due |
|------------|-------------|-----|
| *TBD* | *Placeholder* | *TBD* |

::: {.callout-note}
## Updates
Assignment details will be added throughout the semester. Check back for updates.
:::
